data.content: Needs changes: 1. Completion notifications invalidate only list queries, not the beat detail query, so users can get a completion toast while the open beat panel still shows pre-refinement fields (src/hooks/use-scope-refinement-notifications.ts:34-35 and src/components/beat-detail-lightbox.tsx:55). 2. The new /api/scope-refinement/status route and notification hook have no direct automated contract coverage, leaving delivery and cache-refresh behavior unverified.
